title: melica ciliata subsp. thuringiaca
intro: Melica ciliata subsp. thuringiaca, also known as Thuringian melick, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Melica ciliata subsp. thuringiaca include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
